official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound custom_report_details packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound custom_report_details body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed custom_report_details packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed custom_report_details packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded custom report details map from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the custom_report_details body.
The official ClientboundCustomReportDetailsPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes a bounded String-to-String details map.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCustomReportDetailsPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundCustomReportDetailsPacket preserves the empty details map for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded details map, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove report UI behavior, moderation/reporting semantics, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer report UI behavior, moderation/reporting semantics, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
